title: Cognitive and Perceptual Deepening
objective: Expand the neuroscience foundation from 2 primary sources to 8+. Add perception rules for attention, gaze prediction, cognitive load, and emotional priming. Convert findings into testable predictions.
storyQuestions: What does attentional spotlight research predict about INSERT shot placement?
Is there a Miller's 7+/-2 equivalent for visual info units per shot?
What does emotion priming research predict about minimum setup duration before a contrast-cut?
Can we formalize the Kuleshov effect as a predictive rule?
baseAcceptanceChecks: 8+ cited neuroscience/perception sources with specific findings
Each finding converted to a decision rule with IF/THEN form
At least 3 testable predictions made against Mirror Visitor ch1
Cognitive load limit formalized (max info units per shot by size)
